visuals.title: Paths Connectivity
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Paths and Connectivity</text>
  
  <!-- Nodes -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="20" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="200" cy="150" r="20" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="300" cy="100" r="20" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="150" cy="250" r="20" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="250" cy="250" r="20" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <!-- Edges/Paths -->
  <path d="M100 100 L200 150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M200 150 L300 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M100 100 L150 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M150 250 L250 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M250 250 L300 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="100" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Node A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="200" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Node B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="300" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Node C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="150" y="235" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Node D
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="235" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Node E
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Path Highlight -->
  <path d="M100 100 L200 150 L300 100" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="5,3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="200" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#E91E63" opacity="0">
    Path A→B→C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
